subcodes.first_line: O leaf steadfast and firm in the divine Covenant and Testament! Today thou art a leaf among the leaves of the blessed Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه ثابته راسخه بر عهد و پیمان الهی الیوم ورقه ای از اوراق سدره مبارکه
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @firmness in the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar
